field_values.action_summary: An elderly John Carter introduces himself to the reader/audience, explaining his anomalous aging process and his decision to document his life story before he finally dies.
field_values.camera_intent: Extreme close-ups of eyes and weathered skin textures; Medium shots of seated elderly subject; Soft lighting emphasizing memory and reflection
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Consistent elderly physical appearance for john_carter
Stable vocal tone and delivery rhythm
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH001_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the narrative framing device by introducing an elderly protagonist who is documenting his life history. The scene must convey a sense of urgency regarding his mortality and the anomalous nature of his aging process through intimate, reflective visual language.

## Required Cast
- john_carter (Elderly)

## Required Environments
- Unspecified (Narrative framing space)

## Continuity Constraints
- Consistent elderly physical appearance for john_carter
- Stable vocal tone and delivery rhythm

## Beat List
- BT001: Visual introduction of the physical toll of aging
- BT002: Verbal introduction of the anomalous condition and purpose
- BT003: Final moment of solemnity and intent
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
